title: 60pcs Light Yellow 50mm/5cm Large Ribbon Pull Bows for Party Wall, Gift Wraps, Christmas Trees, Wedding, Birthday Hampers Decoration Florist Pullbows
features: [Good quality material]: The gift basket pull bows are made of good quality Polypropylene. You can wipe it clean when it is dirty. It is anti-static, waterproof and sturdy, non-toxic and tasteless, suitable for package ties of gift, craft, bread, cake, flower decoration
[Nice decoration supplies]: Easy to use and you just need to pull the ribbon strings to form a beautiful bow, will not waste your time, and can make your gifts more attractive and eye-catching

[Wide applications]: These mini pull ribbon bows are great for gift wrapping, crafts, baskets, wine bottles and trees. You can use them in wedding, anniversary day, festivals, Christmas party and so on
description: 50mm quality large pull Bow Ribbon (approx 5" To 7" Wide when assembled) simply pull the inner ribbon cords and A beautiful bow is formed, tie off and attach with the extra long tie waterproof, anti static and wipe clean for use with fresh flowers and bouquets typical uses include creating bows and Decorating arrangements and gifts, flower bouquets and general craft work for wedding, anniversary, birthday. How the pull Bow works 1. Open tails to reveal the tie-strings. 2. Hold the tails open with one hand 3. Pull tie-strings with the other hand to form a bow. 4. Tie - strings at base of bow its that easy The bows will be delivered flat.
